name: chmod
description: Change file and directory access permissions using symbolic or octal notation

options.label: Recursive
options.description: Change permissions recursively for all files and subdirectories

positionalArgs.label: Mode
positionalArgs.description: Permission mode in octal (e.g., 755) or symbolic (e.g., u+x) notation

positionalArgs.label: Files
positionalArgs.description: Files or directories to change permissions on

examples.label: Open read permissions for all users
Restrict file access to owner only
Make all shell scripts in a directory executable
